programs.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent Specials
programs.desc: Phil goes undercover in Scotland, trying to get offers on two houses just outside Glasgow's busy city centre.

programs.title: Grand Designs UK
programs.desc: Tom and Danielle Raffield use their steam-bending skills to build a wavy wooden house in Cornwall, full of amazing twisty furniture. But with only £100k, have they taken on too much?

programs.title: Claire Hooper's House Of Games
programs.desc: Staying over at Claire Hooper's House of Games this week, we've got actor Gyton Grantley, netballer Bianca Chatfield, and comedians Jenny Tian and Nazeem Hussain solving puzzles to earn a toilet seat and also a trophy.

programs.title: Spicks and Specks
programs.sub_title: Jamie Redfern, Ella Hooper, Brendan Burns, Fiona O'loughlin & Banjo Duo
programs.desc: Joining Adam Hills are Jamie Redfern, Ella Hooper, Brendan Burns, Fiona O'Loughlin and Banjo Duo.

programs.title: QI
programs.desc: Sandi Toksvig takes a look at upbringing with Sally Phillips, Josh Pugh, Aaron Simmonds and Alan Davies.

programs.title: Would I Lie To You?
programs.sub_title: Mark Bonnar, Sheila Hancock, Stephen Mangan & Anita Rani
programs.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the award-winning comedy panel show with David Mitchell and Lee Mack as the lightning-quick team captains. Over the course of the show, celebrity guests reveal amazing stories about themselves, some of which are true and some of which are not. The aim of the game is to fool the opposition into mistaking fact for fiction and fiction for fact. The guests on this episode are Mark Bonnar, Sheila Hancock, Stephen Mangan and Anita Rani.
